name: Cha Gio (Vietnamese Spring Rolls)
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Tree Ears Dried Mushroon (Nam Meo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the filling by mincing the garlic and chopping the onions.
2. Mix the minced garlic with the ground pork until well combined.
3. Add the crab meat and shrimp to the mixture, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
4. Incorporate the dried mushrooms into the mixture.
5. Season with pepper to taste.
6. Wrap each portion of the filling in cellophane noodles, sealing tightly at the edges.
7. Place the rolls on a serving platter.
8. Serve immediately.
